description_long: This stuffed toy is modeled after the Pokémon character Pichu, featuring a round, pale yellow body with large, triangular black-tipped ears and a small, cheerful face. Its eyes are wide and black with white pupils, and it has a small, open mouth with a pink tongue, giving it a joyful expression. The cheeks are highlighted with pink blush spots, and a black, jagged collar encircles its neck. The arms are short and stubby, extending slightly outward, while the legs are small and rounded. The back is plain yellow, with the black-tipped ears and collar remaining prominent. The overall appearance is soft, plush, and inviting, making it suitable for children or as a decorative item in urban environments.
description: A soft, plush Pichu stuffed toy with large black-tipped ears, pink cheeks, and a cheerful face, featuring a black jagged collar and a round yellow body.
description_view_0: Front view shows the smiling face, pink cheeks, large black-tipped ears, and black jagged collar clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the roundness of the body, the protruding ear, and the blush on the cheek.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain yellow back, the black-tipped ears, and the collar, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the ear, cheek blush, and the curve of the body.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and happy, with wide, open eyes and a smiling mouth showing a pink tongue. The pink blush on the cheeks enhances the joyful appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms slightly extended outward and legs close together, head facing forward.
